title: pgstat — Locks & Activity Overview
description: Fleet genelinde aktif sorgu, bekleme olaylari, blocking chains, vacuum durumu. Bir satira/instance'a tikla → Instance Detail.

list.name: service_group
list.query: select distinct service_group from control.instance_inventory where service_group is not null order by 1
list.label: Service Group

targets.rawSql: select count(*) as value from fact.pg_activity_snapshot a join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = a.instance_pk where a.snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' and a.state = 'active' and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)

select count(*) as value from fact.pg_activity_snapshot a join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = a.instance_pk where a.snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' and a.state = 'idle in transaction' and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)

select count(*) as value from fact.pg_lock_snapshot l join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = l.instance_pk where l.snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' and l.granted = false and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)

select count(*) as value from fact.pg_progress_snapshot p join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = p.instance_pk where p.snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)

panels.title: Instance Bazlı Aktivite Özet — tıkla, detaya git
panels.description: Her instance için anlık aktivite/idle/lock/vacuum sayıları. Bir satıra tıklayınca Instance Detail açılır.

targets.rawSql: with active as (select instance_pk, count(*) filter (where state='active') as active_cnt, count(*) filter (where state='idle') as idle_cnt, count(*) filter (where state='idle in transaction') as idle_tx_cnt, count(*) filter (where state='active' and wait_event_type is not null) as waiting_cnt from fact.pg_activity_snapshot where snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' group by instance_pk), locks as (select instance_pk, count(*) filter (where granted = false) as waiting_locks from fact.pg_lock_snapshot where snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' group by instance_pk), prog as (select instance_pk, count(*) as prog_cnt from fact.pg_progress_snapshot where snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' group by instance_pk) select i.instance_pk, i.display_name as instance, coalesce(i.service_group, '—') as group_name, coalesce(a.active_cnt, 0) as aktif, coalesce(a.idle_cnt, 0) as idle, coalesce(a.idle_tx_cnt, 0) as idle_tx, coalesce(a.waiting_cnt, 0) as wait_event, coalesce(l.waiting_locks, 0) as bekleyen_lock, coalesce(p.prog_cnt, 0) as vacuum_progress from control.instance_inventory i left join active a on a.instance_pk = i.instance_pk left join locks l on l.instance_pk = i.instance_pk left join prog p on p.instance_pk = i.instance_pk where i.is_active and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null) order by idle_tx desc nulls last, bekleyen_lock desc nulls last, aktif desc

select i.instance_pk, i.display_name as instance, a.snapshot_ts, a.pid, a.datname, a.usename as "user", a.state, a.wait_event_type, extract(epoch from (a.snapshot_ts - a.query_start))::int as "süre_sn", left(a.query, 200) as query from fact.pg_activity_snapshot a join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = a.instance_pk where a.snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' and a.state = 'active' and a.query_start is not null and (a.snapshot_ts - a.query_start) > interval '1 minute' and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null) order by a.query_start asc limit 100

with latest as (select instance_pk, max(snapshot_ts) as ts from fact.pg_lock_snapshot where snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' group by instance_pk) select i.instance_pk, i.display_name as instance, l.snapshot_ts, l.pid as bekleyen_pid, l.locktype, l.mode, array_to_string(l.blocked_by_pids, ',') as blocked_by, coalesce(extract(epoch from (l.snapshot_ts - l.waitstart))::int, 0) as bekleme_sn from fact.pg_lock_snapshot l join latest la on la.instance_pk = l.instance_pk and la.ts = l.snapshot_ts join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = l.instance_pk where l.granted = false and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null) order by l.waitstart asc limit 50
